reviews.comment:
Excelente está estación de servicios, pertenece al ACA y colindante a la estación de servicios está el camping del ACA que es excelente también. Volviendo a la estación de servicios impecable los baños y encontrás todo lo que te hace falta. Los playeros excelente la atención. Recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
This service station is excellent; it belongs to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), and next door is the ACA campground, which is also excellent. The service station itself is spotless, the restrooms are immaculate, and you'll find everything you need. The attendants are excellent and provide outstanding service. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvaU03WFBREAE

reviews.comment:
Limpio y buena atención. Pero cada vez que vengo, no tienen más criollos ni facturas. Ya van 3 veces. Sábado 20 hs y ya no hay nada para acompañar el café

(Translated by Google)
Clean and the service is good. But every time I come, they're out of pastries and croissants. This is the third time. Saturday at 8 pm and there's nothing left to go with the coffee.
